nasb.text: “Speak to the sons of Israel and say to them, ‘When a man or woman makes a special vow, the vow of a Nazirite, to dedicate himself to the Lord,

esv.text: “Speak to the people of Israel and say to them, When either a man or a woman makes a special vow, the vow of a Nazirite,  to separate himself to the Lord,

cnv.text: “你要告訴以色列人，對他們說：‘無論男女，如果許了特別的願，就是拿細耳人的願，就要離俗歸耶和華。

ccb.text: “你把以下条例告诉以色列人。 “无论男女，如果许愿做拿细耳人，把自己献给耶和华，
